name: Antipasto Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 Jar mixed colored peppers, in oil
recipeInstructions:
1. On a lightly floured surface, roll each loaf of bread dough out to 14x8 inch rectangles.
2. Brush the rolled dough with beaten egg.
3. Use half of the ingredients per loaf: arrange sliced Provolone, salami, pepperoni, and peppers in oil on the dough.
4. Stretch the dough and bring down the top, then bring up the bottom of the dough and roll it in a jelly-roll fashion. Seal the edges and ends with egg wash.
5. Place each loaf on a baking sheet. Repeat with the second loaf.
6. Loosely cover the loaves with a towel and let rise for about 30 minutes.
7. Brush and seal the loaves with additional egg wash.
8. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
